title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Indiabulls Real Estate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Indiabulls Real Estate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
